subject: Horizon Project Update
body: The Horizon project is on track. All milestones met, delivery expected by end of month.
Heads up — Horizon is NOT on track. We're at least 3 weeks behind schedule. The backend migration hit unexpected issues.

subject: Meeting at 2pm
body: Reminder: board meeting at 2pm today. Please join the conference room on Floor 3.

subject: Meeting at 3pm
body: Don't forget our client presentation at 3pm today. This is the make-or-break pitch for the Zenith deal.

subject: Yesterday's urgent issue
body: This message is from yesterday — it should be lower priority since it's stale.
This message is dated tomorrow — a future timestamp that shouldn't normally exist.
